title: secretx-aws-kms: implement AWS KMS signing backend
description: Implement SigningBackend for AWS KMS asymmetric keys. SecretStore::get and put return SecretError::NotFound since KMS never exposes key material. URI: secretx://aws-kms/<key-id-or-alias>. sign() calls kms:Sign with the configured algorithm. public_key_der() calls kms:GetPublicKey and encodes result as DER SubjectPublicKeyInfo. algorithm() returns the key spec: ECC_NIST_P256 maps to EcdsaP256Sha256, RSA_2048 to RsaPss2048Sha256, ECC_NIST_P25519 to Ed25519 (not all regions; return clear error if unsupported). Credential chain via aws-config ambient chain. Dep: secretx-core, aws-sdk-kms, aws-config. Integration tests via LocalStack.
